title: [v4.1] Backport fix for Windows machine init failure when ran in System32
body:
Backports fix to #14416 (#14570) since it's being hit by a number of users

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

```release-note
Fixes ssh keygen failure when `machine init` is run from C:\Windows\System32 on Windows
```

I dunno if we're planning a 4.1.2; RCs for 4.2.0 should start on Monday

This isn’t critical; there is a workaround that works. I only propose this in case there is some future 4.1.2, that it be included. If you guys think that’s not ever going to happen feel free to close
